title: Classic Ukrainian Bread
description: A simple recipe for a traditional Ukrainian bread, perfect for serving with soups or stews.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine yeast and warm water.
2. Let the mixture sit for 5-10 minutes, until it becomes frothy.
3. Add flour, sugar, and salt to the bowl. Mix until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough for 10-15 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
5. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
7. Punch down the dough and shape it into a round or oblong loaf.
8. Place the loaf on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes, until the bread is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
10. Let the bread cool on a wire rack for 10-15 minutes before slicing.
